channel.title: Sample Tech Feed
channel.description: A sample RSS feed for testing

item.title: OpenAI Releases New Model
item.description: OpenAI has released a new model that outperforms previous versions on key benchmarks.

item.title: Linux Kernel 7.0 Released
item.description: The Linux Foundation has announced the release of kernel version 7.0 with major performance improvements.

item.title: Rust Overtakes Python in Web Dev
item.description: A new survey shows Rust gaining ground in web development use cases traditionally dominated by Python.
